title: 100Days Plugin
body:
# [日本語の説明はこちらへ](https://github.com/datsuns/mc-100days/blob/v.1.1.0_mc1.21.10/README.ja.md)

# 100 Days plugin

# Feature

* show current day at the bottom of window. (above inventory)
* show splash text when the night is over!

# Install for Fabric

depends on

* [Fabric API](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/fabric-api)

# Install for NeoForge

no other dependent mod.
